mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-OS-Builder SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-OS-Builder SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.
